mapper.sql: USER_ID AS userId, GROUP_ID AS groupId, GROUP_NAME AS groupName, GROUP_ORDER AS groupOrder, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_USER_WORK_GROUP ( USER_ID, GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, GROUP_ORDER, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.userId}, #{groupId}, #{dto.groupName}, #{dto.groupOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM FWK_USER_WORK_GROUP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY GROUP_ORDER ASC, GROUP_ID ASC
